name: vidhook
description: Render videos from JSON via the vidhook API. Bundles the vidhook MCP server (validate / render / get_status / get_usage) and the vidhook-movie skill for authoring correct Movie JSON.

api_key.title: vidhook API key
api_key.description: Your vidhook API key. Use a vh_test_ key for free, watermarked drafts; vh_live_ for clean, billed output. Get one at https://vidhook.app
